name: Suburban-SOC Detection Coverage
description: Suburban-SOC ATT&CK coverage (WS1.5). Green = a detection exists (Sigma->Elastic Detection Engine, or a Zeek network detection). Generated by scripts/setup/build_attack_coverage.py.
